sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32401" key="e)/kloutron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκλου-τρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32401.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">washing-vessel,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
